nasb.text: When all the flocks were gathered there, they would then roll the stone from the mouth of the well and water the sheep, and put the stone back in its place on the mouth of the well.

esv.text: and when all the flocks were gathered there, the shepherds would roll the stone from the mouth of the well and water the sheep, and put the stone back in its place over the mouth of the well.

cnv.text: 當所有羊群都到齊了，牧人就把井口的石頭輥開，取水給羊群喝，然後把石頭放回井口原處。

ccb.text: 羊群聚集在井旁的时候，牧人就把石头挪开饮羊，随后再把石头挪回原处。

csbs.text: 只有当所有羊群聚拢在那里时，牧人们才会把那块石头从井口上滚开，给羊群饮水，然后再把那块石头放回井口的原处。
